title: Pressure from OPI
summary: OPI pressure clarifies the adversarial system while exposing internal fracture points around Rubies.

narrative.newInfo: Suppression is policy-driven and legacy-deep, framed as societal stability management.
narrative.dripHook: Will Rubies remain enforcement or become a break in the system?
narrative.payoffDelivered: Antagonist logic and leverage map become legible.
narrative.notes: Cadence: sustained tension plateau. Function: define opposition architecture. Exit: tactical path to Potter narrows but remains open.

rewardTokens.description: OPI rationale and operational pattern become legible.
Rubies' alignment uncertainty introduces interpersonal tension.
